channel.title: Posts on Selvamani S
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Selvamani S

item.title: What resilience actually means in infrastructure
item.description:
Resilience is not about uptime percentage.

It is about how systems behave under failure.

True resilience includes:

  • fault isolation
  • graceful degradation
  • fast recovery paths

item.title: Why datacenter modernization fails in many organizations
item.description:
Modernization is often treated as a migration problem.

But the real challenge is architecture redesign.

Without:

  • workload understanding
  • dependency mapping
  • cost modelling

Most modernization efforts create new problems.
